struct Record {
    name: String,
    score: f64,
}

fn sort_records(records: &mut [Record]) {
    // GOOD: compare fields directly without allocation
    records.sort_by(|a, b| {
        a.name
            .cmp(&b.name)
            .then_with(|| a.score.partial_cmp(&b.score).unwrap_or(std::cmp::Ordering::Equal))
    });
}
